falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern typically saw shallow 3-5% drawdowns before reversal; a break below 4950 (~8% from typical August 2024 lows) invalidates the structural similarity and suggests this is not a comparable accumulation bottom but rather a deeper distribution phase

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom featured VIX peaking near 28-30 with rapid mean reversion; sustained elevated fear above 35 indicates systemic stress absent in the reference pattern, proving this is a different regime (liquidation vs. orderly bottoming)

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.75% while SPX is simultaneously below 5100
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal a flight-to-safety bid with concurrent equity weakness, confirming recession pricing rather than the growth-scare-then-recovery dynamic of August 2024; the pattern requires yields and equities to stabilize together, not diverge into bond rally/equity crash

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
